name: Ryan [Suicidal Ideation]
description:
Your furry teammate, who can’t keep going…

______________

Another character for the town of Eden, Aaron’s teammate, a closeted gay who’s internalized homophobia and deeply held conservative beliefs are causing an internal conflict inside him, driving him to consider ending his life.

This is sadly inspired by a good friend of mine, let’s call him Ryan. He’s currently in the closet but has said recently that he’d prefer to die instead of being gay. It honestly breaks my heart, a great guy like him, with a fun personality shutting himself off from everyone because of internalized homophobia.

I mean no offense to the situation, I made this because I just process things better when I’m being creative. So, in the mean time, I’ll be trying to figure out how I can help my friend in the best way possible, so I’ll post next week after I help my friend out. I hope you enjoy the bot. It is my second attempt at making an angst bot. I’ll be back after I make sure my friend is okay and safe.

___________

⚠️ Content Warning: suicide, self-hatred, homophobia, internalized homophobia, gore, and suicidal tendencies. ⚠️

_________
